news.title: Micron hits $1 trillion market cap for the first time as stock surges 18%
news.summary: A global memory shortage driven by AI is spiking demand for chipmakers like Micron. Micron is the world's largest memory chip maker.

news.title: Trump to host Cabinet meeting at Camp David on Wednesday as Iran talks continue
news.summary: Trump and his top officials will make the rare trip to the woodsy Maryland retreat to discuss issues both foreign and domestic, a White House official says.

news.title: American Airlines picks SpaceX's Starlink for in-flight Wi-Fi on more than 500 planes
news.summary: American Airlines says it will install SpaceX's Starlink for inflight Wi-Fi on more than 500 of its airplanes. American Airlines: Starlink will be installed on morethan 500 of our airplanes.

news.title: Judges block Alabama redistricting maps that would dilute Black vote in midterms
news.summary: A three-judge panel found that the 2023 congressional district maps adopted by Alabama intentionally discriminated against Black voters. The maps were drawn by the state's Republican Party.

news.title: U.S. conducts 'self-defense strikes' in Iran as Trump pushes for peace deal
news.summary: Targets included missile launch sites and Iranian boats attempting to emplace mines. Targets included missiles launch sites, Iranian boats trying to emplaces mines.

news.title: This bear market signal Wall Street ignores is putting your money at risk right now
news.summary: Veteran trader Steve Burns prepares for a 50% decline. Burns exposes the 3 “deadly stock-market sins’ destroying portfolios.

news.title: More than 9 million people are missing out on $58 billion in food and medical benefits. Are you one of them?
news.summary: Social stigma, application struggles and eligibility concerns prevent people from getting benefits. Lack of awareness, social stigma and application struggles are some of the reasons people don't get benefits.

news.title: Micron’s stock soars as UBS slaps on an out-of-sight price target
news.summary: Strong memory chip demand is leading to “enhanced’ long term agreements. Micron’s stock and earnings power should benefit, UBS says.

news.title: I’m 67. Our family trust earns $300,000 annually for my kids. How do I ensure they won’t get killed on taxes?
news.summary: “My thought is to distribute all of the income to my children each year so that the trust itself pays little to no tax,” he says.

news.title: Space stocks are rocketing as SpaceX keeps making pre-IPO headlines with first Starship launch
news.summary: SpaceX recently tested the latest version of its massive 407-foot rocket for the first time. The company is planning to go public soon.
